column1: 12z Euro now trending a ragged system more to the West. Keeps a pretty sloppy low impacting Florida late in the weekend. Models will continue to flip flop for another day or 2. LOTS of different possibilities in play. Tonight would be a great night to check out DPL at 7:30.
great. A little wind and some nice showers. I will take that any day!
what is DPL?
Denis Phillips Live.
Denis Phillips Live 😉

~Tonite on FB @ 7:30 Denis Phillips will give more info on this storm.. Usually 1/2 hour program.. He is usually on every Tues & Thurs but with the unknown coming in he's been on every night..Hope this helps..He's the "Best Weather Guy" EVER!!! Don't miss out....
